theme: The Transcript — Event Pipeline + Briefing Events + OpenCode Plugin

shots.title: slope extract command + session-end-events hook

hazards.description: FK constraint on events table prevented inserting events with non-existent session_id. Removed FK — events are independent telemetry.

shots.notes: New extract command reads structured event JSON from file/stdin. Added session-end-events hook template. 9 new CLI tests. Required migration fix to remove FK constraint.

shots.title: Event-to-common-issues pipeline

hazards.description: TypeScript type inference failed on conditional assignment in distill.ts. Fixed with explicit Awaited<ReturnType<>> annotation.

shots.notes: New pipeline.ts in core: clusterEvents() groups by type+area, findPromotionCandidates() finds 2+ sprint patterns, runPipeline() promotes to common issues. New distill CLI command. 15 pipeline tests + 1 distill test.

shots.title: Briefing integration with events
shots.notes: Added recentEvents + eventRecencyWindow params to formatBriefing(). New RECENT EVENTS section groups by type with sprint attribution. CLI loads events from store automatically. 11 new briefing tests.

shots.title: OpenCode plugin for session lifecycle hooks
shots.notes: Generated .opencode/plugins/slope-plugin.ts on init --opencode. Handles session.created/idle/deleted/compacted events. 2 new init tests.

conditions.description: Context continued from previous session — required reconstruction from summary

nutrition.description: Full build+test+typecheck after every ticket (634 tests at completion)
Commit-per-ticket discipline — 4 commits for 4 tickets, pushed after each
39 new tests: 27 core (16 pipeline + 11 briefing) + 2 CLI init + 9 CLI extract + 1 distill
FK constraint removal in S11-1 was caught immediately by tests — fast recovery

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Session telemetry pipeline is now end-to-end: extract events → cluster → promote to common issues → surface in briefing. OpenCode plugin closes the platform gap.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: Events table has NO FK to sessions — this is intentional. Events are independent telemetry that should survive session cleanup. The pipeline's [telemetry] prefix distinguishes auto-promoted patterns from manual entries.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The OpenCode plugin system is surprisingly clean — TypeScript functions with event dispatch, much more composable than shell script hooks. The briefing events section was a natural addition.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: All three platforms now have session lifecycle hooks. The event pipeline can auto-maintain common-issues. Ready for HTML reports and launch prep.

bunker_locations: events table FK constraint — events must NOT have FK to sessions (independent telemetry)
TypeScript conditional assignment type inference — use explicit Awaited<ReturnType<>> for store method return types
yardage_book_updates: slope extract --file=<path> [--session-id=<id>] [--sprint=<N>]: reads JSON events into store
formatBriefing() now accepts recentEvents + eventRecencyWindow for telemetry display
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, 4 in_the_hole — zero misses, 2 hazards (FK constraint, TS type inference)
Tests grew from 595 to 634 (+39 across core, cli)
3 new files created (pipeline.ts, extract.ts, distill.ts), 1 generated template (slope-plugin.ts)
